summary_one_line: Reach png_icc_profile_error with all four bytes of the profile signature word being valid ICC-signature characters (space/digit/A-Z/a-z).

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An iCCP chunk whose embedded profile-signature 4-byte word decodes to four characters each passing is_ICC_signature_char (== 32, 48-57, 65-90, or 97-122). The winner seeds carry an iCCP chunk (offset 0x35-0x38 = 69 43 43 50) with signature/payload bytes in the printable-ASCII run (45='E', 31='1'); reaching the colorspace/ICC validation path requires sustaining many byte-CMPs against ICC constants so the true side of line 1809 is taken for all four sub-bytes.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog seeds have 45(E) repeated across offsets 0x27-0x33 and 31(1) at 0x3b-0x3f, with the iCCP chunk type 69 43 43 50; on the blocker line the winner takes the true side (T=8 F=16) where the loser never does (T=0 F=24), meaning its signature bytes satisfy the ICC-char range and it resolves 9/10 trials.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog seeds carry a gAMA chunk (67 41 4d 41) and an iTXt chunk (69 54 58 74) with non-signature payload bytes (00, b1, 8f, 0b, fc) at the diffing offsets; they never take the true side of the blocker (T=0 F=24) and the branch stays blocked in 9/10 trials at avg 18.78h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: Both fuzzers already carry cmplog input-to-state substitution, so the comparison-solving mutator is held constant; the only technique delta is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient. The per-byte CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance buckets reward inputs that get progressively closer to the ICC-signature character ranges across the four is_ICC_signature_char sub-comparisons, giving value_profile_cmplog a gradient toward the all-valid-signature word that plain cmplog (edge-bucket feedback only, no gradient) lacks.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker tests whether a byte is a valid ICC signature character (space, digit, A-Z, a-z).
The caller validates all four bytes of a 32-bit signature word via is_ICC_signature_char.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: is_ICC_signature_char(it >> 24) /* checks all the top bits */ &&

evidence_trail.claim: Winner seeds carry an iCCP chunk with signature/payload bytes in the printable-ASCII run.
Loser seeds carry a gAMA chunk and an iTXt chunk with non-signature payload bytes.
Winner takes the true side of the blocker while the loser never does.
The byte diff shows winner has E (0x45) where loser has gMA/iTXt-derived bytes at the chunk-type/payload offsets.
The only technique delta between the two involved fuzzers is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
edge counters,
per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets.

evidence_trail.claim: Plain cmplog has no CMP_MAP gradient feedback, only edge-bucket signal.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
same edge-bucket signal as naive. The CMP buffer is
consumed by the mutator, not by feedback.

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over cmplog with the value_profile delta.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile), not I2SRandReplace, so db_query.py lineage I2S-floor verification is not the governing signal here. Both involved fuzzers (cmplog and value_profile_cmplog) already carry I2SRandReplace, so I2S is held constant across the pair and cannot explain the divergence; the only differing technique is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient buckets per the MECHANISM CONTEXT section. No lineage query was run because it would not discriminate the mechanism for a pair where both arms share cmplog.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on a four-byte ICC-signature-char word where value_profile_cmplog and cmplog reach the true branch at statistically equal rates (no CMP_MAP gradient advantage), which would show the gradient does not drive the divergence.

weakest_evidence_point: The byte diff confirms winner has valid-ICC-char bytes and loser does not, but it does not directly prove the CMP_MAP gradient (rather than lucky havoc on the iCCP chunk type) is what gets value_profile_cmplog across the four sub-comparisons.
